series_metadata.series_description: Engineering Reports submitted by grantee describ- ing existing problems and recommendations for solution. Change Orders--amen- dments to original construction contract. Detail Plans--blueprints showing detailed architechtural and engineering design of s

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating unit until com- pletion and audit of project. Upon release of federal audit report, file can then be sent to the Federal Archives., Paper: Archives
